title: Rich Buttery German Gelatin Grill
description: A light and gooey German dish featuring unflavored gelatin, grilled to perfection with a rich buttery flavor, Whole30-friendly and perfect for a snack or dessert
instructions: In a small bowl, dissolve the gelatin in 1 cup of water and let it sit for 5 minutes
In a medium saucepan, combine the melted butter, coconut milk, honey, lemon juice, and salt, and heat over low heat, stirring constantly
Add the dissolved gelatin to the saucepan and stir until well combined
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it cool to room temperature
Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish and refrigerate for at least 3 hours
Preheat the yakimono-grill to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
Remove the dish from the refrigerator and cut it into 6 equal pieces
Grill each piece for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until lightly browned
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately
